creator: thierry@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback


- sorry, there is a long time since your PR, and in the meantime this 
tarball has been removed from a lot of mirrors; could you please update 
it to the latest release, in order to make it fetchable easily? 

- mkfontdir and mkfontscale should not belong to RUN_DEPENDS; 

- fc-cache is run when you install the port, but it is not when you 
install it from a package (@exec fc-cache could be added in pkg-plist); 

- it seems that the sentence about `xset fp' in pkg-message is no more 
required with the modern Xorg. 

Best regards, 
--  
Th. Thomas.
